raw:
```json
{
  "mission": "Learn basic Japanese greetings and introductions to confidently order a simple meal on the 25th.",
  "name": "Quick Japanese Start",
  "topics": [
    {"path": "a.b.c", "kind": "recall", "summary": "Japanese Hiragana alphabet – first five characters: あいうえお"},
    {"path": "a.b.d", "kind": "skill", "summary": "Pronounce ‘konnichiwa’ (hello) and ‘arigato’ (thank you)”},
    {"path": "a.b.e", "kind": "recall", "summary": "Basic Japanese sentence structure: Subject-Object-Verb"},
    {"path": "a.c.f", "kind": "skill", "summary": "Introduce yourself – ‘Watashi wa… desu’ (I am…)"},
    {"path": "a.c.g", "kind": "recall", "summary": "Common Japanese numbers 1-10"},
    {"path": "a.d.h", "kind": "skill", "summary": "Order a coffee using learned phrases – ‘Kohi onegaishimasu’"},
    {"path": "a.d.i", "kind": "recall", "summary": "Polite Japanese phrase for ‘please’ – ‘Onegai shimasu’"}
  ],
  "phases": [
    {"topics": ["a.b.c"], "criteria": {"min_attempts": 5, "min_accuracy": 0.6}, "focus": "Hiragana recognition and pronunciation"},
    {"topics": ["a.b.d", "a.b.e"], "criteria": {"min_attempts": 10, "min_accuracy": 0.8}, "focus": "Speaking basic phrases – hello & thank you"},
    {"topics": ["a.c.f"], "criteria": {"min_attempts": 15, "min_accuracy": 0.7}, "focus": "Self-introduction structure and pronunciation"},
    {"topics": ["a.c.g", "a.d.h"], "criteria": {"min_attempts": 12, "min_accuracy": 0.8}, "focus": "Numbers & ordering a simple item."},
    {"topics": ["a.d.i"], "criteria": {"min_attempts": 8, "min_accuracy": 0.9}, "focus": "Politeness and final phrase practice"}
  ],
  "refinement_questions": [
    "Does focusing on ordering a meal feel more achievable than confident introductions?",
    "Should we add visual aids – pictures of the food/drinks to aid memory?",
    "What does ‘fluent’ mean *specifically* in this context (order, greet, basic conversation)?"
  ]
}
```
